case_title: BENJAMIN WOEHLER VS. JORDAN'S KITCHEN LLC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $85) SERVED MAR-10-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JORDAN'S KITCHEN LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED MAY-04-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHACHTER, JORDAN
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $330.00 **ADDITION OF ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT** FILED BY WOEHLER, BENJAMIN AS TO DEFENDANT JORDAN'S KITCHEN LLC SCHACHTER, JORDAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-01-2022 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT JORDAN'S KITCHEN LLC
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-04-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-04-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN WOEHLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JORDAN'S KITCHEN LLC IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY JORDAN SCHACHTER, FOUNDER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-04-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-06-2022 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN WOEHLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JORDAN'S KITCHEN LLC IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY JORDAN SCHACHTER, FOUNDER. CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW TO AMEND COMPLAINT. BOTH DEFENDANTS ARE GRANTED ZOOM APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AMEND
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-01-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-01-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN WOEHLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JORDAN KITCHEN LLC IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM APPEARANCE, REPRESENTED BY JORDAN SCHACHTER (OWNER). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $330.00 FILED BY WOEHLER, BENJAMIN AS TO DEFENDANT JORDAN'S KITCHEN LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-2022 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT JORDAN'S KITCHEN LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-06-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-01-2022 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN WOEHLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JORDAN'S KITCHEN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT JORDAN SCHACHTER IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK CALLED TO ENSURE DEFENDANT'S ZOOM INFORMATION IS CURRENT AND DEFENDANT INFORMED THE CLERK OF HIS MEDICAL ISSUE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS ARE ON FILE. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOEHLER, BENJAMIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JORDAN'S KITCHEN LLC SCHACHTER, JORDAN DEFENDANT'S WENT OUT OF BUSINESS DURING COVID. NO EVIDENCE TO PIERCE THE CORPORATE VEIL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
